{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Chariot
|rank=SS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=09-22
|source=Fragment Crafting (3.3%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Hellas Treasure Maps (5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.12%)
|description=On Sep 22, 3000 BC, Ares was so obsessed with vehicles that he made this Golden Chariot.

Ares, the god of war, is a dashing and masculine man with curly auburn hair, blue eyes, glowing skin, and ripped muscles. Wearing a blood-red tunic with bronze armor and helmet, he drives his chariot with a spear besides him. He holds the reins of two warhorses, one red and the other black. They run in opposite directions pulling the chariot through the dusty desert into the stormy skies.
|fame=53
|art=68
|fth=103
|civ=76
|tech=47
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail RUSH +20<br>In Angel Form, Travel SPD +0.4%
|ss2=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail RUSH +30<br>In Angel Form, Travel SPD +0.6%
|ss3=Snail ATK +40<br>Snail RUSH +40<br>In Angel Form, Travel SPD +0.8%
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Snail RUSH +60<br>In Angel Form, Travel SPD +1.2%
|ss5=Snail ATK +80<br>Snail RUSH +80<br>In Angel Form, Travel SPD +1.6%
|ss6=Snail ATK +110<br>Snail RUSH +110<br>In Angel Form, Travel SPD +2.2%
|ss7=Snail ATK +110<br>Snail RUSH +110<br>In Angel Form, Travel SPD +2.2%<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|arena|wind dmg|600}}
|skill2={{Skills|arena|wind res|60}}
|skill3={{Skills|hellas|green reagent|15}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Travel Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Wind DMG Boost]]
[[Category:Wind RES Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Reagent Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Power Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Divine Dragon Descents Boost]]
[[Category:Sanctum Warrior Boost]]
